Category.Name: Application Profiles
Category.Description: Application level profiles represent a collection of Facets necessary to build a functional OPC UA Application.They specifically include Transport Profiles and generally also Security Profiles.

Profile.Name: Pressurised Shot Blasting Machine Server Facet

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastMachine Basic
ConformanceUnit.Description: At least one instance of the ShotBlastMachineMachineType is available on the server. The instance has all mandatory nodes.

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastMachine Media
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every ShotBlastMachineType instance has at least one instance of the optional node from the ShotBlastMediaType.

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastMachine Deployment Monitoring
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every ShotBlastMachineType instance has at least one instance of the optional nodes from the DeploymentType.

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastMachine RefillSilo
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every ShotBlastMachineType instance has at least one instance of the optional node from the RefillSiloType.

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastMachine Pressurised
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every ShotBlastMachineType instance has at least one instance of the optional node from the PressurisedBoilerType.

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastMachine Filtration System
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every ShotBlastMachineType instance has at least one instance of the optional node from the FiltrationType.

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastMachine PAEFS Filtration System OPC40740
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every ShotBlastMachineType instance has not implemented the optional FiltrationType but the FilterSystemType of the OPC 40740 OPC UA for Process Air Extraction and Filtration Systems (PAEFS) Companion Specification.

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastMachine StateMachines
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every ShotBlastMachineType instance has one instance of the optional node from the 3:MachineryOperationModeStateMachineType and the 3:MachineryItemState_StateMachineType.

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastMachine JobManagement
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every ShotBlastMachineType instance has at least one instance of the optional node from the 5:JobManagementType.

ConformanceUnit.Name: ShotBlastChamber Multiple Blasters
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every ShotBlastChamberType instance has more then one instance of the mandatory Placeholder node from the BlasterType.

ConformanceUnit.Name: Wheel Blaster
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every BlasterType instance has an instance of the optional node WheelRotationSpeed.

ConformanceUnit.Name: Pressurised Blaster
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every BlasterType instance has an instance of the optional node ShotBlastPressure.

ConformanceUnit.Name: Hopper Fill Level Monitoring
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every HopperType instance has an instance of the optional nodes HopperLevelMax and HopperLevelMin.

ConformanceUnit.Name: Refill Silo Fill Level Monitoring
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every RefillSiloType instance has an instance of the optional nodes RefillSiloLevelMax and RefillSiloLevelMin.

ConformanceUnit.Name: Pressurised Boiler Fill Level Monitoring
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every PressurisedBoilerType instance has an instance of the optional nodes PressurisedBoilerLevelMax and PressurisedBoilerLevelMin.

ConformanceUnit.Name: Filtration Status Monitoring
ConformanceUnit.Description: Every FiltrationType instance has an instance of the optional node 3:MachineryItemState_StateMachineType.
